member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.ApiDescriptionExtensions.GetFriendlyId(System.Web.Http.Description.ApiDescription)
member.summary: Generates an URI-friendly ID for the . E.g. "Get-Values-id_name" instead of "GetValues/{id}?name={name}"

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfig
member.summary: Use this class to customize the Help Page. For example you can set a custom to supply the documentation or you can provide the samples for the requests/responses.

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Controllers.HelpController
member.summary: The controller that will handle requests for the help page.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetDocumentationProvider(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Web.Http.Description.IDocumentationProvider)
member.summary: Sets the documentation provider for help page.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleObjects(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.Type,System.Object})
member.summary: Sets the objects that will be used by the formatters to produce sample requests/responses.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleRequest(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the sample request directly for the specified media type and action.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleRequest(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Sets the sample request directly for the specified media type and action with parameters.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleResponse(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the sample request directly for the specified media type of the action.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleResponse(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Sets the sample response directly for the specified media type of the action with specific parameters.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleForMediaType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue)
member.summary: Sets the sample directly for all actions with the specified media type.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetSampleForType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Object,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.Type)
member.summary: Sets the sample directly for all actions with the specified type and media type.
member.param: The parameter type or return type of an action.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetActualRequestType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Type,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Specifies the actual type of passed to the in an action. The help page will use this information to produce more accurate request samples.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetActualRequestType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Type,System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Specifies the actual type of passed to the in an action. The help page will use this information to produce more accurate request samples.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetActualResponseType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Type,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Specifies the actual type of returned as part of the in an action. The help page will use this information to produce more accurate response samples.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetActualResponseType(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.Type,System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Specifies the actual type of returned as part of the in an action. The help page will use this information to produce more accurate response samples.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.GetHelpPageSampleGenerator(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration)
member.summary: Gets the help page sample generator.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.SetHelpPageSampleGenerator(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator)
member.summary: Sets the help page sample generator.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageConfigurationExtensions.GetHelpPageApiModel(System.Web.Http.HttpConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the model that represents an API displayed on the help page. The model is initialized on the first call and cached for subsequent calls.

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.ModelDescriptions.ModelDescriptionGenerator
member.summary: Generates model descriptions for given types.

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.ModelDescriptions.ModelNameAttribute
member.summary: Use this attribute to change the name of the generated for a type.

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel
member.summary: The model that represents an API displayed on the help page.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel.ApiDescription
member.summary: Gets or sets the that describes the API.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel.UriParameters
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection that describes the URI parameters for the API.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel.RequestDocumentation
member.summary: Gets or sets the documentation for the request.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel.RequestModelDescription
member.summary: Gets or sets the that describes the request body.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel.RequestBodyParameters
member.summary: Gets the request body parameter descriptions.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel.ResourceDescription
member.summary: Gets or sets the that describes the resource.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel.SampleRequests
member.summary: Gets the sample requests associated with the API.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel.SampleResponses
member.summary: Gets the sample responses associated with the API.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.Models.HelpPageApiModel.ErrorMessages
member.summary: Gets the error messages associated with this model.

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator
member.summary: This class will generate the samples for the help page.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.ActualHttpMessageTypes
member.summary: Gets CLR types that are used as the content of or .

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.ActionSamples
member.summary: Gets the objects that are used directly as samples for certain actions.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.SampleObjects
member.summary: Gets the objects that are serialized as samples by the supported formatters.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.SampleObjectFactories
member.summary: Gets factories for the objects that the supported formatters will serialize as samples. Processed in order, stopping when the factory successfully returns a non- object.
member.remarks: Collection includes just initially. Use SampleObjectFactories.Insert(0, func) to provide an override and SampleObjectFactories.Add(func) to provide a fallback.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.GetSampleRequests(System.Web.Http.Description.ApiDescription)
member.summary: Gets the request body samples for a given .
member.returns: The samples keyed by media type.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.GetSampleResponses(System.Web.Http.Description.ApiDescription)
member.summary: Gets the response body samples for a given .
member.returns: The samples keyed by media type.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.GetSample(System.Web.Http.Description.ApiDescription,YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.SampleDirection)
member.summary: Gets the request or response body samples.
member.param: The value indicating whether the sample is for a request or for a response.
member.returns: The samples keyed by media type.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.GetActionSample(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Type,System.Net.Http.Formatting.MediaTypeFormatter,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.SampleDirection)
member.summary: Search for samples that are provided directly through .
member.param: The value indicating whether the sample is for a request or for a response.
member.returns: The sample that matches the parameters.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.GetSampleObject(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the sample object that will be serialized by the formatters. First, it will look at the . If no sample object is found, it will try to create one using (which wraps an ) and other factories in .

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.ResolveHttpRequestMessageType(System.Web.Http.Description.ApiDescription)
member.summary: Resolves the actual type of passed to the in an action.
Resolves the type of the action parameter or return value when or is used.
member.param: The value indicating whether the sample is for a request or a response.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleGenerator.WriteSampleObjectUsingFormatter(System.Net.Http.Formatting.MediaTypeFormatter,System.Object,System.Type,System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue)
member.summary: Writes the sample object using formatter.

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleKey
member.summary: This is used to identify the place where the sample should be applied.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleKey.#ctor(System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue)
member.summary: Creates a new based on media type.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleKey.#ctor(System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,System.Type)
member.summary: Creates a new based on media type and CLR type.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleKey.#ctor(YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.SampleDirection,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Creates a new based on , controller name, action name and parameter names.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleKey.#ctor(System.Net.Http.Headers.MediaTypeHeaderValue,YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.SampleDirection,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Creates a new based on media type, , controller name, action name and parameter names.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleKey.ControllerName
member.summary: Gets the name of the controller.

member.name: P:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.HelpPageSampleKey.ActionName
member.summary: Gets the name of the action.

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.ImageSample
member.summary: This represents an image sample on the help page. There's a display template named ImageSample associated with this class.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.ImageSample.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.InvalidSample
member.summary: This represents an invalid sample on the help page. There's a display template named InvalidSample associated with this class.

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.ObjectGenerator
member.summary: This class will create an object of a given type and populate it with sample data.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.ObjectGenerator.GenerateObject(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates an object for a given type. The type needs to be public, have a public default constructor and settable public properties/fields. Currently it supports the following types: Simple types: , , , , , etc. Complex types: POCO types. Nullables: . Arrays: arrays of simple types or complex types. Key value pairs: Tuples: , , etc Dictionaries: or anything deriving from . Collections: , , , , , or anything deriving from or . Queryables: , .
member.returns: An object of the given type.

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.SampleDirection
member.summary: Indicates whether the sample is used for request or response

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.TextSample
member.summary: This represents a preformatted text sample on the help page. There's a display template named TextSample associated with this class.

member.name: T:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.XmlDocumentationProvider
member.summary: A custom that reads the API documentation from an XML documentation file.

member.name: M:YAEP.WMS.Api.Areas.HelpPage.XmlDocumentationProvider.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The physical path to XML document.
